_doc.t510_canonical_core: T510: Qwen Code reads lifecycle hooks from the `hooks` object in `.qwen/settings.json` (Claude-Code-style: per-event array of { matcher, hooks:[{type:command,...}] }; `command` may invoke PowerShell or any shell). Each native event routes to a thin canonical entrypoint `python .qwen/hooks/g-hk-on-<event>.py` which calls `g_hk_core.dispatch("<event>")`. The shared core `.qwen/hooks/g_hk_core.py` is byte-identical across every platform overlay and runs the per-event CONCERN_CHAIN (concern hooks self-gate on payload). Native->canonical map (g_hk_core.PLATFORM_EVENT_MAP['qwen']): SessionStart->session-start, SessionEnd->session-end, UserPromptSubmit->user-prompt-submit, PreToolUse->tool-start, PostToolUse->tool-end, Stop->stop. timeout is in milliseconds. Schema verified against https://qwenlm.github.io/qwen-code-docs/en/users/features/hooks/ .
